mission: Fetch key noetfield.com pages, hash bodies, and diff against repo static files to establish live truth
problem_statement: Live site state is asserted from memory rather than evidence; drift between repo and production is undetected.

deliverable.acceptance: per-URL status + body sha256 + match/mismatch verdict; bodies saved as artifacts; zero writes to the site

roi.rationale: trust: replaces memory-claims about the public site with hashed evidence | founder 2026-07-08: supporting trust proof, not top ROI priority
